mapper.insert: insert into member (mid, mname, mpassword, memail, menaled, mrole) values (#{mid}, #{mname}, #{mpassword}, #{memail}, #{menaled}, #{mrole})
mapper.update: update member set mname = #{mname}, mpassword = #{mpassword}, memail = #{memail}, menaled = #{menaled}, mrole = #{mrole} where mid = #{mid}
